title: MobArmyBattle
description: Two teams collect mobs and later fight each other’s mobs in arena-based waves, with the fastest team winning. (inspired by BastiGHG)
body:
This plugin was inspired by German youtuber BastiGHG [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=46V4KpWCPJA](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=46V4KpWCPJA),
you have 2 teams, which first kill as many mobs as they can to collect them.

Then in "arenas", each team fights against the mobs, the other team has defeated in multiple waves.

## Setup

### 1. Team configuration

- Use `/mbteam add <team> <player>` to add a player to a team; (permission: `mb.team` or op) (team can be either `1` or `2`)

**NOTE:** *the first player added to the team will later configure the waves.*

### 2. Collecting mobs

- Use `/start HH:MM:SS` (e.g. `/start 00:30:00` for 30 minutes) to start the collection phase.; (permission: `mb.timer` or op)
- Each team has a backpack, that can be opened with `/bp`

### 3. Selecting Waves

- The first player of each team will see a GUI, where you can assign the mobs you collected to the 4 waves.

**NOTE:** *if you accidentally closed the wave config UI, you can reopen it with `/waveconf`* 

### 4. Fighting

- After both teams configured their waves, someone who is either op or has the permission `mb.team`, can type `/ready`
- You will then fight against the waves, all mobs will have the glowing effect
- The team that finishes first wins

**NOTE:** *`/ready` will assume BOTH teams are ready, and teleport everyone, it should only be typed once*
